nodes.label: Good Shepherd: voice, name, lay down life
Dedication: identity claims → stoning attempt → withdrawal → belief

hinges.identity_□: Jesus is the Good Shepherd, one with the Father.
hinges.enactment_◇: He calls by name, lays down his life, and defends his works/identity before hostile leaders.
hinges.effect_Δ: His sheep hear and receive eternal life; hostility intensifies; many believe beyond the Jordan.
